pl.netigen.coreapi.payments

Class NoAdsNotAvailable

  • pl.netigen.coreapi.payments.NoAdsNotAvailable
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    INoAds

    public class NoAdsNotAvailable
implements INoAds

    interface INoAds implementation when we have no no-ads payment

    See Also:
    interface INoAds

    • Field Detail

      • INSTANCE

        public static NoAdsNotAvailable INSTANCE

        interface INoAds implementation when we have no no-ads payment

        See Also:
        interface INoAds

    • Method Detail

      • getPackageName

        @NotNull
public java.lang.String getPackageName()

        Application package name for default no ads sku

      • getNoAdsInAppSkuList

        @NotNull
public java.util.List<java.lang.String> getNoAdsInAppSkuList()

        List of no ads sku available in application

        For default it is one sku: packageName +".noads"

        See Also:
        packageName

      • getNoAdsActive

        @NotNull
public kotlinx.coroutines.flow.Flow<java.lang.Boolean> getNoAdsActive()

        Emits Flow<Boolean> indicating that no ads in-app purchase is or has changed to active or inactive Use this for behave with no ads related stuff, (e.g. hide/show no ads buy buttons)

        See Also:
        Boolean

      • makeNoAdsPayment

        @NotNull
public java.lang.Void makeNoAdsPayment(@NotNull
                                                 android.app.Activity activity,
                                                 @NotNull
                                                 java.lang.String noAdsSku)

        Makes call to current payment implementation to launch billing flow for an no ads in-app purchase. It will show the purchase screen to the user

        Parameters:
        activity - activity used to as context for launch
        noAdsSku -

        optional parameter - no ads in-app purchase identifier (sku). Use when it is multiple no-ads sku-s, because this takes current provided no ads sku from noAdsInAppSkuList.

        For default it is packageName +".noads"
